heading: Tandegin vs Tarcoola Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tandegin, Western Australia and Tarcoola Beach, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarcoola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tandegin (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tandegin or Tarcoola Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tandegin has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Tarcoola Beach scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tandegin scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Tarcoola Beach scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tandegin or Tarcoola Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarcoola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
